name: New Orleans Turkey Creole
recipeIngredient: 1 pound can or 4-5 cooked whole tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach the turkey legs in water to cover, with salt for 1 hour or until tender.
2. Cook the turkey in broth. Remove the meat from the bones. You should have about 2 cups of meat. Reserve the broth.
3. Drain the tomatoes and reserve the juice.
4. In a large skillet, cook the diced bacon until crisp. Drain it.
5. To the hot drippings, add the chopped onion, green bell pepper, and garlic. Saute them until soft.
6. Add the drained tomatoes, bacon, salt, pepper, and turkey to the skillet. Combine everything with the tomato juice.
7. Add water to make 2 1/2 cups of liquid. Return it to the skillet.
8. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
9. Add the okra and cook for an additional 5-10 minutes until the okra is thawed and warm.
10. Serve over rice.
